reviews.comment:
Cachi es un hermoso pueblo emplazado en los Valles Calchaquies. El viaje HERMOSO,  se pasa por el valle de Lerma, por entre los cerros llenos de gigantes cardones que perecen centinelas. Hay varios miradores para poder tomar fotos.
El 30 % de la ruta de ripio DESTRUIDA el restante 70% de asfalto en pésimo estado en la mitad del recorrido. Ir en excursión ó vehículo alquilado. Vale la pena las 3 horas de recorrido.

(Translated by Google)
Cachi is a beautiful town nestled in the Calchaquí Valleys. The drive is stunning, passing through the Lerma Valley, winding through hills covered in giant cacti that stand like sentinels. There are several viewpoints perfect for taking photos.
30% of the gravel road is in ruins, while the remaining 70% is asphalt in terrible condition for half the journey. It's best to go on a tour or rent a car. The 3-hour drive is well worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacjlpbVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Tienen 3 surtidores con expendio de cada lado.
Toda la cola era para diesel, me baje a preguntar para hacer carne al sector de infinia NAFTA que no había nadie. Me mandaron hacer la cola igual... menos criterio imposible.
Mejorar el sentido común en la atención, e incluir el pago con la app. Me dijeron que no andaba.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They have three pumps, one on each side. The entire line was for diesel, so I got out to ask about the Infinia gasoline section, which was empty. They still told me to get in line... the lack of common sense is unbelievable. They need to improve their customer service and add app payment. They told me it wasn't working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaOTRmWmZnEAE
